name: Kugel (Jewish Noodle Pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles and drain.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Lightly butter a 2-quart glass baking dish.
4. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, butter, sour cream, and sugar; mix well.
5. Add the beaten eggs, grated apples, and vanilla. Blend until combined.
6. Stir in the raisins and noodles.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
8. Bake for 45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Remove from the oven and brush with apricot preserves.
10. Add the halved cherries.
11. Serve with the main course.
